owner: Inner Cosmos Psychology Capability Working Group

title.en-SG: Map the pull in both directions

description.zh-CN: 区分靠近与回避的力量，找一个可逆的小实验。
description.en-SG: Separate approach and avoidance forces, then choose a reversible experiment.

limitations.zh-CN: 这是决策反思，不预测结果，也不适合替代高风险领域的专业意见。
limitations.en-SG: This is decision reflection, not outcome prediction or a substitute for professional advice in high-risk domains.
